LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: THE SHERIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO RELEASE $800 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ALL OTHER FUNDS THAT THE SHERIFF IS HOLDING SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE SHERIFF SHALL WITHHOLD $100 PER PAY PERIOD ($100 PER WEEK) TO SERVICE THE DEBT. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. , CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rosemary McCarthy, Esq. 310-289-5177 Law Offices of Kenosian & Miele for Plaintiff.
Jairo Reyes, 415-713-8166 Defendant in Pro Per.
Zoe Tatarsky, legal research attorney assists Defendant in Spanish per the directive of the Court.

Hearing is held. Mr. Reyes informs the court he needs a Spanish interpreter. The Court instructs legal research attorney to interpret for Mr. Reyes. Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The judgment debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted as follows: The Sheriff is instructed to release $800 to the judgment creditor. All other funds that the Sheriff is holding shall be released to the judgment debtor. The Sheriff shall withhold $100 per pay period ($100 per week) to service the debt.

The Court will prepare an order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
